theme.description: Objective, rigid, and function-first. A high-end developer tool aesthetic designed to avoid generic AI-slop gradients. Uses strict structural grayscale with high-visibility accents.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-white

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Bento grids, Structural Grayscale. Never center by default.
layout_spacing.landing_page: Tetris bento grid, asymmetrical layout. Hero overlay strictly bg-black/40. No Bootstrap columns.
layout_spacing.dashboard: Control Room grid, gap-6, 1px solid borders, no shadows. Full-height matching widgets.
layout_spacing.converter_workspace: Dense utility spacing (gap-2, p-4), strict 1px borders. Left pane: Image upload/URL input & Prompts. Right pane: Tabs for Generated Code / Iframe Preview / Split View.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none), crisp 1px borders, high contrast. Primary CTA: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Accent Action (Generate): bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D32F2F].
components.cards: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md, inner padding p-6 or p-8.
components.inputs: Shadcn based, flat bg-zinc-950, border-zinc-800, focus:border-zinc-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white.
components.stepper: Minimalist geometric stepper. 1px line connecting square nodes or simple slash-separated text.
components.navigation: Crystal glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px border-white/10 on landing. Flat solid header on dashboard.
components.data_testids: Mandatory on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='generate-code-button', data-testid='framework-select')

motion.philosophy: Minimalist and snappy. No bouncy animations. Optimize for developer efficiency.
motion.hover_states: Quick transition-colors duration-150. Explicit text color definitions on hover.
motion.loading_state: ASCII loaders or strictly monochrome skeleton loaders. Progress stepper updates smoothly.

instructions_to_main_agent: File format requirement: The application uses .js files, not .tsx. Implement React components using .jsx/.js.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/landing pages to achieve asymmetrical bento grids, avoid Shadcn structural components there.
Use Shadcn heavily for the Dashboard and Converter Workspace (Tabs, Select, Dialog, Input, Form).
Strictly apply data-testid to all inputs, buttons, select menus, and nav links for automated testing.
Enforce dual-theme or strictly dark mode globally (as per Swiss High-Contrast spec). Do not use generic purple (#9D4CDD) or teal (#1B93A4) gradients.
Install and configure 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'JetBrains Mono' via standard webfonts, Google Fonts, or Fontshare.

The UI2Code converter workspace must implement: Drag & drop zone, URL paste toggle, Framework Picker, Style Picker, Prompt Context textarea, and a right pane with Tabs (Code Viewer, Iframe Preview, Original Image).
Implement a 3-step generating state (e.g., Analyzing -> Generating Code -> Finalizing) when standard conversion happens.
